REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED AS FOLLOWS: THIS ACTION IS ABATED UNTIL PROBATE ACTION IS RESOLVED. UPON THE FINAL RESOLUTION OF THE PROBATE ACTION EITHER PARTY MAY FILE APPROPRIATE NOTIFICATION OF SUCH RESOLUTION AND PROCEED WITH THIS ACTION, IF NECESSARY AND PROPER AT THAT TIME. PARTIES REQUESTS TO CONSOLIDATE AND TRANSFER MADE IN OPPOSITION AND REPLY ARE DENIED AS PROCEDURALLY IMPROPER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: N. WONG, NOT REPORTED (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-03-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is SUSTAINED as follows: This action is abated until Probate Action is resolved. Upon the final resolution of the Probate Action either party may file appropriate notification of such resolution and proceed with this action, if necessary and proper at that time. Parties requests to consolidate and transfer made in opposition and reply are denied as procedurally improper. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-03-2020 Continued To Sep-03-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Abbas Gokal, 949.753.9100 for Defendant Cham Luu.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs CAM LUU, ANTHONY LUU, CAM PHAM, and CHRISTINE LUU's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is continued to September 3, 2020. Parties are ordered to comply with SFRL 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of their respective filings in support of and in opposition to this motion with cover letters reflecting the new hearing date. The Court is in possession of the Courtesy copy of the moving papers. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
